heading: Custody of archaeological resources
label: 470dd Custody of archaeological resources

amendments: Amendments2014—Par. (2). substituted “chapter 3125 or chapter 3203 of title 54” for “the Act of () or the Act of ()”.Pub. L. 113–28716 U.S.C. 469–469c16 U.S.C. 431–433June 27, 1960June 8, 1906

children.text: the exchange, where appropriate, between suitable universities, museums, or other scientific or educational institutions, of archaeological resources removed from public lands and Indian lands pursuant to this chapter, and
the ultimate disposition of such resources and other resources removed pursuant to chapter 3125 or chapter 3203 of title 54.
